## Checklist

- [ ] `make lint` passes
- [ ] `make review` passes (function-level code review)
- [ ] `make test` passes (unit suite + coverage gate)
- [ ] `make test-all` passes if the pipeline/steps changed
- [ ] Notebook re-executed end-to-end if it changed (`make notebook`)
- [ ] No generated artifacts (models, reports, data) committed
